  • Uses of PropertyModelGenerator in dev.morphia.critter.parser

    Methods in dev.morphia.critter.parser that return types with arguments of type PropertyModelGenerator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PropertyModelGenerator>
    PropertyFinder.find(Class<?> entityType, io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.ClassModel classModel)
     
    List<PropertyModelGenerator>
    PropertyFinder.find(Class<?> standinType, io.github.dmlloyd.classfile.ClassModel classModel, Class<?> targetType)
    Discovers properties from standinType's classfile but generates accessor and model bytecode targeting targetType.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PropertyModelGenerator
    PropertyModelGenerator.emit()
    Emits the generated property model class and returns this generator.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field, boolean runtimeMode)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method, boolean runtimeMode)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    Method parameters in dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator with type arguments of type PropertyModelGenerator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntityModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
    EntityModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.entityModel(Class<?> type, Class<?> standinType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type, reading entity-level annotations from standinType.
    Constructor parameters in dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator with type arguments of type PropertyModelGenerator
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    EntityModelGenerator(Mapper mapper, Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Creates a new entity model generator where the entity class is also the annotation source.
     
    EntityModelGenerator(Mapper mapper, Class<?> type, Class<?> standinType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Creates a new entity model generator for the given entity, reading entity-level annotations from standinType (which differs from type only for @ExternalEntity).
